creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
After today's repeated try installing and after another update of the 
 ports tree security/pam_ldap installs successfully.
 
 The issue is no longer valid for me, so it could be closed.
 
 Thanks and my apologies for the noise in case the issue arose due to my 
 lazyness updating the tree.
 
 Regards,
 O.
